title: marsdenia glabra
intro: Marsdenia glabra, also known as the rough milk vine, is a species of flowering plant in the family Apocynaceae, native to tropical and subtropical regions of Asia and Australia. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Marsdenia glabra are attributed to its ability to lower blood pressure, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant and anti-cancer properties. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or extracts, making it a popular ingredient in natural remedies and supplements.
